mapper.sql: id, instance_no, biz_no, parent_no, process_unit_code, product_code, result, auto_run_flag, auto_run_times, next_auto_run_time, request_content, response_content,vars, ext_data, created_date, modified_date, deleted
mapper.insert: insert into process_unit_instance${@com.jd.easyflow.sharding.ShardingHolder@getTableSuffix()} ( id, instance_no, biz_no, parent_no, process_unit_code, product_code, result, auto_run_flag, auto_run_times, next_auto_run_time, vars, ext_data,request_content, response_content ) values ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{instanceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{autoRunFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{autoRunTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{nextAutoRunTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{vars,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into process_unit_instance${@com.jd.easyflow.sharding.ShardingHolder@getTableSuffix()} (id, instance_no, biz_no, parent_no, process_unit_code, product_code, result, auto_run_flag, auto_run_times, next_auto_run_time, vars, ext_data,request_content, response_content, created_date, modified_date ) values (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{instanceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{autoRunFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{autoRunTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{nextAutoRunTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{vars,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: update process_unit_instance${@com.jd.easyflow.sharding.ShardingHolder@getTableSuffix()} set instance_no = #{instanceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, biz_no = #{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_no = #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_unit_code = #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, auto_run_flag = #{autoRunFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, auto_run_times = #{autoRunTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, next_auto_run_time = #{nextAutoRunTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, vars = #{vars,jdbcType=OTHER}, ext_data = #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER}, request_content = #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, response_content = #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted=0

update process_unit_instance${@com.jd.easyflow.sharding.ShardingHolder@getTableSuffix()} set biz_no = #{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_no = #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_unit_code = #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, auto_run_flag = #{autoRunFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, auto_run_times = #{autoRunTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, next_auto_run_time = #{nextAutoRunTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, vars = #{vars,jdbcType=OTHER}, ext_data = #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER}, request_content = #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, response_content = #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where instance_no = #{instanceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and deleted=0

update process_unit_instance${@com.jd.easyflow.sharding.ShardingHolder@getTableSuffix()} set biz_no = #{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_no = #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_unit_code = #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, auto_run_flag = #{autoRunFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, auto_run_times = #{autoRunTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, next_auto_run_time = #{nextAutoRunTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, vars = #{vars,jdbcType=OTHER}, ext_data = #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER}, request_content = #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, response_content = #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where instance_no = #{instanceNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted=0

update process_unit_instance${@com.jd.easyflow.sharding.ShardingHolder@getTableSuffix()}
biz_no = #{bizNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_no = #{parentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
process_unit_code = #{processUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
auto_run_flag = #{autoRunFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
auto_run_times = #{autoRunTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
next_auto_run_time = #{nextAutoRunTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
vars = #{vars,jdbcType=OTHER},
ext_data = #{extData,jdbcType=OTHER},
request_content = #{requestContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
response_content = #{responseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where instance_no = #{instanceNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted=0
